Specification: DomiWorks VW 1.8T/1.9T to BMW 8HP 45/50/70/75 N57 Adapter Kit (SKU 21015002)
Notes: Verified $1,397 USD. 07K shares flywheel/bellhousing bolt pattern with VW 1.8T/1.9T — this kit applies directly. Includes billet SS2541 flywheel/flexplate + center guide + hardware. 33mm aluminum adapter plate. Fits 8HP45/50/51/70/75/76 N57 pattern. REQUIRES starter 068911024H (see below). VERIFY 07K compatibility directly with DomiWorks before ordering.

Specification: VW Longitudinal Starter 068911024GX (reman) / 068911024H (new)
Notes: Verified $349.99 + $50 refundable core (Bosch reman 068911024GX at FCP Euro). DomiWorks kit explicitly requires 068911024H (Bosch new) — same nose, fully interchangeable. 068911024GX reman has FCP Euro lifetime guarantee. NOT the BMW N54 starter from Phase 1.

Specification: Race3 / JNC Custom E36 07K Mount Arms
Notes: Custom fabrication required

Specification: VR6 Mk3 OBD2 021133064A - Cable Operated
Notes: OBD2 96-99 only. Bolt pattern matches 07K intake manifold. Confirmed by Boost Brothers 944 07K swap kit. 40-80 used / 108 new.

Specification: Lokar LOK-TC-1000LS148 148in Cut-to-Fit
Notes: Stock E36 cable will not work - wrong end fitting for VR6 drum and incorrect length for 07K position. Alt: OEM VR6 donor cable + adapt pedal end.

Specification: iABED / EFI Motorsport 07K Longitudinal Rear Sump Pan
Notes: Verified - Gold standard. Budget alt: modified stock pan (TIG weld rear sump box)

Specification: S-PAU or iABED 07K Longitudinal Billet Oil Filter Housing
Notes: Required for longitudinal engine swap — OEM transverse housing will not clear E36 bay. S-PAU housing includes: M10x1.0 port (PST-F1 direct fit — no adapter), 1/8 NPT port for secondary sender, M12x1.5 turbo oil feed port, built-in 90°C MOCAL thermostat for oil cooler loop. Bosch PST-F1 transfers from M52 VANOS banjo to this M10x1.0 port with zero wiring changes. iABED housing is an equivalent alternative with similar provisions.

Specification: Garrett G-Series G30-770 REVERSE ROTATION
Notes: Verified $2731.20 (supercore $1883.91 + 0.83 A/R housing $847.29). Reverse rotation required to correctly orient compressor outlet when using SPA MK5 manifold in longitudinal installation \u2014 same approach confirmed by 944 community. V-band turbine inlet. T3-to-V-band adapter required (~$40, adds ~25-35mm stack height). HOOD CLEARANCE: verify before ordering \u2014 G30-770 is large-frame and E36 top-mount clearance is tight. If marginal: (a) vented/bubble hood, (b) step down to G25-660 RR (~$2000), (c) reverse rotation T3-inlet turbo from Precision Turbo (special order, eliminates adapter height). V-band connection is superior to T3 bolts \u2014 adapter is not a weakness, height is the only trade-off.

Specification: Tial 44mm MVR External Wastegate (V-band)
Notes: Verified. V-band flanged. 44mm required for boost control above 500whp on E85. SPA MK5 manifold already has V-band 44/45mm WG provision — direct fit

Specification: T3 Flange to V-Band Turbo Adapter
Notes: Connects T3 manifold outlet to G30-770 V-band turbine inlet. Verify T3 bolt pattern and V-band diameter at purchase.

Specification: MaxxECU Custom 07K Harness (build offline) + Deutsch AS / Souriau 8STA firewall bulkhead connector
Notes: Build using MaxxECU CMC connector ends with VW sensor connectors (crank VR, cam Hall, CLT NTC, TPS, injectors EV14). Same ECU — harness swap replaces M5x harness at engine change. No additional ECU cost. RECOMMENDED: terminate both M52 and 07K harnesses at a 47- or 79-way Deutsch Autosport (AS series) or Souriau 8STA flanged bulkhead connector on the firewall. Cabin side wired permanently; each engine harness plugs in as a single unit. Engine swap = one connector disconnect. Install bulkhead during Phase 1 chassis prep. Budget ~$80-120 receptacle + ~$60-90 per mating plug + contacts. See Enhancements doc [ELECTRICAL] section.

Specification: CXRacing E36 FMIC Kit (Option B path) OR carry from Phase 1A
Notes: IF Option A (Turbo M50) path was taken: FMIC core from Phase 1A carries over ($0 additional). Piping routing will need modification for 07K/G30-770 RR turbo position. IF Option B (NA M52) path: purchase CXRacing kit at this phase ($610 verified).

Specification: Mishimoto MMOP-SPT Thermostatic Sandwich Plate + 10-row core
Notes: MMOP-SPT sandwich plate $170.95 (verified). Installs between oil filter and 07K housing — thermostatic valve prevents flow to cooler until oil reaches operating temp. Add Setrab/Mocal 10-row core (~$100-150) + -10AN lines (~$60). Mandatory for 07K turbo. Note: if Phase 1 M5x oil cooler used MMOCF-BMW fitting approach instead

Specification: SPA Turbo MK5 T3 Twin Scroll (TMW22) + reverse rotation turbo
Notes: Verified $459.90. Designed for MK5 transverse BUT usable in longitudinal orientation with reverse rotation turbo (confirmed by Rennlist 944 community). RHD steering rack clearance is a DOWNPIPE routing issue — not a manifold issue — solved by custom downpipe (see below). T3 turbo flange. V-band 44/45mm wastegate port. Twin scroll for 5-cyl pulse separation.

Specification: Custom RHD Downpipe (routes around steering rack)
Notes: Custom fab required for RHD clearance. MUCH cheaper than custom manifold ($400-600 vs $1200-1800). Routes turbo outlet under/around RHD steering rack to 3in exhaust. Must be ceramic coated. Reference: any E36 RHD turbo downpipe fabricator familiar with RHD rack clearance.

Specification: Ceramic Coating (Manifold + Downpipe)
Notes: Not optional - protects RHD steering rack seals and brake lines from heat soak

Specification: Injector Dynamics ID1050x - Set of 5 (replaces Phase 1A 630cc)
Notes: Verified $249/injector (Full Race) x5 = $1245. 07K is a 5-cylinder — 5 injectors only. Replaces Phase 1A Siemens Deka 630cc set \u2014 630cc injectors can be resold (~$200-250) or kept as spare. ID1050x is an EV14 connector (standard VW/Audi) \u2014 compatible with MaxxECU 07K harness EV14 injector connectors. Supports 600+whp on E85 at reasonable duty cycle. Price here is new set only \u2014 do not add to Phase 1A injector cost.

Specification: Walbro 450LPH E85 In-Tank Pump + Install Kit (replaces Walbro 255)
Notes: Verified $203.99 (TF-Works TIA485-2). Replaces Phase 1 Walbro 255LPH \u2014 255LPH is borderline at 600whp E85 (~53 GPH demand vs ~45 GPH realistic output at 60PSI). 450LPH E85-rated (TI Automotive / Walbro F90000267). Radium Engineering E36 fuel pump install kit (radiumauto.com/P2087) provides the correct basket adapter. Price here is pump + universal kit only \u2014 do not add to Phase 1 pump cost.

Specification: BBG Intake Manifold Fuel Rail (custom or universal -6AN)
Notes: The Boost Brothers longitudinal intake manifold has its own fuel rail provisions. Confirm fuel rail compatibility with BBG directly at time of intake order. Budget $150-300 for a compatible billet rail or custom fabrication. OEM VW 07K fuel rail (transverse) will NOT fit the BBG longitudinal manifold.

Specification: Custom E36 charge pipe fabrication or universal mandrel-bent kit
Notes: The CXRacing FMIC core (Phase 1A) or purchased at Phase 3 (Option B) carries over, but the charge piping is turbo-position specific. The G30-770 reverse rotation + SPA MK5 manifold exits on the opposite side from the K64/M5x application. All Phase 1A CXRacing aluminum piping is unusable for 07K. Budget for custom mandrel-bent aluminum piping (local fab shop) or universal 2.5-3in elbow kit.

Specification: BBG kit component — assess at engine-in-car stage
Notes: The 07K factory thermostat housing exits at an angle incompatible with many swap bays. BBG 944 swap kit includes a thermostat housing adapter + 1.8T water neck (180 water neck) to convert the outlet direction for clean routing. FOR E36: assess at engine-in-car stage whether the factory 07K thermostat housing routes cleanly to the E36 radiator. If routing works, $0. If not, contact BBG — they include this in the 944 kit and may sell separately (~$50-100). DO NOT order before engine is positioned in bay. Confirmed in BBG Porsche 944 07K install video at 7:55.

Specification: Custom E36-to-07K Coolant Routing Kit
Notes: 07K coolant inlet/outlet locations differ from M52. The BBG intake manifold has coolant provisions (throttle body heat). iABED oil housing has coolant connections. Budget for custom silicone hoses (Samco or universal) to connect 07K ports to E36 CSF radiator. Measure routing at engine-in-car stage before ordering hose lengths. Gates or Vibrant universal silicone reducers + straight hoses.

Specification: Radium Engineering VTA Competition Catch Can — L (20-0772) or XL (20-0771)
Notes: MANDATORY for turbo build at high RPM. Two -10AN ORB inlet ports — direct fit to BBG billet valve cover -10AN crankcase port (Phase 2). Vent to atmosphere (VTA) — drain after every track day. L (20-0772): 0.6L. XL (20-0771): 0.9L — spec for Formula Drift minimum capacity compliance. Add -10AN hose (~$40-60). ALSO REQUIRED: address stock PCV port on intake manifold side — install one-way check valve or block off to prevent boost pressure back-feeding into crankcase. Oil consumption note: expect 50-150ml per track day in can post-break-in; near zero between street-only oil change intervals.

Specification: Condor Slim Shaft mandatory (Phase 1)
Link: Exhaust manifold must be top-mount design

Specification: Column-Assist EPS — RHD: EPowerSteering E36 kit or Peugeot 206 GTi / Toyota MR2 ZZW30 salvage column
Notes: Column-assist EPS eliminates hydraulic pump entirely. Rack (stock or Z3 2.75-LTL upgrade) stays in place as manual rack. Options: (1) EPowerSteering.com E36-specific kit ($1300) — column core exchange required, VERIFY RHD column compatibility before ordering; (2) Peugeot 206 GTi or Toyota MR2 ZZW30 salvage EPS column ($50–100 donor + bracket fab) — RHD-native, documented in UK/AU community. Speed-sensitive: wire MaxxECU GPO to EPS controller VSS input for automatic assist reduction at speed. Z3 rack upgrade recommended: direct E36 bolt-in, 2.75 turns LTL, cap hydraulic lines.

Specification: 12V Electric AC Compressor (universal kit)
Notes: Not belt-driven — mounts anywhere via universal bracket + 12V power. Retains E36 condenser / evaporator / cabin controls. Requires new AC line fabrication. Price TBD — verify final unit selection before ordering.

Specification: Electric AC compressor (12V) — no bracket required
Notes: Supersedes custom bracket approach. Electric compressor mounts independently of engine belt — no conflict with turbo plumbing or RHD clearance constraints.

Specification: Modified stock pan (TIG-weld rear sump)
Notes: must clear steering rack and subframe
